premium.testPhase: This feature is currently in a test phase and available to premium users only.

landing.heroDescription: A personal project to help you track your kitchen inventory, plan meals, and keep an eye on household spending. Still a work in progress — new features are being added regularly.
landing.featuresSubtitle: HomeBud is actively being developed. Here's what's working right now.
landing.featureKitchenDesc: Track items with expiry dates, categories, and nutrition info.
landing.featureScanDesc: Scan product barcodes to quickly add items using Open Food Facts.
landing.featureAIDesc: Get recipe suggestions based on what's currently in your kitchen.
landing.featureGroceryDesc: Log shopping trips with items, prices, and discounts.
landing.featureEatingOutDesc: Record restaurant visits and track how much you spend eating out.
landing.featureSubscriptionsDesc: Keep track of recurring costs like meal kits and delivery services.
landing.featureSpendingDesc: See where your money goes with charts by category and month.
landing.featureRecipesDesc: Save your own recipes and discover new ones online.
landing.step1Desc: Sign up in a few seconds to get started.
landing.step2Desc: Scan barcodes, or add items manually to build your kitchen inventory.
landing.step3Desc: Track spending, get recipe ideas, and stay on top of expiry dates.
landing.ctaDescription: HomeBud is free to use while in development. Feel free to create an account and explore.

tos.title: Terms of Service
tos.subtitle: Please review and accept our terms to continue.
tos.section1Body: We store your email and name. Your kitchen inventory, recipes, and spending data are stored securely on our servers and are only accessible to you and your household members.
tos.section2Body: Your data is used solely to provide the Kitchen Helper service. We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties. Anonymized, aggregated usage statistics may be collected to improve the service.
tos.section3Body: We use OpenAI for AI-powered features (recipe suggestions, receipt scanning) and Open Food Facts for product lookups. Data sent to these services is limited to what is necessary for the feature to function.
tos.section4Body: You may request deletion of your account and all associated data at any time by contacting us. Upon deletion, all your personal data will be permanently removed from our servers.
tos.section5Body: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
tos.accept: I Accept the Terms of Service
